# Workspace Permissions

**Slug:** `workspace-permissions` · **Version:** `2021-03` · **Tools:** 16

Control and manage your users detailed permissions upon Workspaces and Engines.

[← Back to API index](./README.md)

## Tools by tag

- [service accounts :: workspaces :: permissions](#service-accounts-workspaces-permissions) (8)
- [workspaces :: permissions](#workspaces-permissions) (8)

## service accounts :: workspaces :: permissions

### `workspace_permissions__createPermissionsSA`

```
POST /security/service-accounts/permissions/batch
```

Create sets of workspace permissions for a service account

Create sets of workspace permissions on the current system. Allows to upload list of workspace permissions to be created.Creation actions will be applied in the same order as defined in the list

_No path/query/header parameters._

**Request body** (`application/json`): `Permission[]`.


### `workspace_permissions__createWorkspacePermissionsSA`

```
POST /security/workspaces/{workspaceId}/service-accounts/{serviceAccountId}/permissions
```

Create a service account workspace permission

Create a permission of a service account on a workspace.

**Parameters**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `workspaceId` | path | `string` | yes | The workspace where rights will be applied. Example Value: 6089228181ef4423736e47a9 |
| `serviceAccountId` | path | `string` | yes | The user for which rights will be applied. Example Value: b9e10a3f-9d68-44bb-862f-b2aa56dc7191 |

**Request body** (`application/json`): `"AUTHOR" | "EXECUTE" | "VIEW" | "MANAGE" | "PUBLISH"[]`.


### `workspace_permissions__deletePermissionsSA`

```
DELETE /security/service-accounts/permissions/batch
```

Delete workspace permissions for a service account

Remove all permissions where service account id is one from specified ones with request AND workspace is one from specified ones with request.
Special case: empty collection for users means that permissions for all service accounts and specified workspaces will be deleted (and vise versa).

**Parameters**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `workspaceIds` | query | `string[]` | no | Workspace ids list used to compute permission intersections with specified users. |
| `serviceAccountIds` | query | `string[]` | no | Service account ids list used to compute permission intersections with specified workspaces. |


### `workspace_permissions__deleteWorkspacePermissionsSA`

```
DELETE /security/workspaces/{workspaceId}/service-accounts/{serviceAccountId}/permissions
```

Delete a service account workspace permission

Delete a permission of a service account on a workspace.

**Parameters**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `workspaceId` | path | `string` | yes | The workspace where rights will be applied. Example Value: 6089228181ef4423736e47a9 |
| `serviceAccountId` | path | `string` | yes | The user for which rights will be applied. Example Value: b9e10a3f-9d68-44bb-862f-b2aa56dc7191 |


### `workspace_permissions__getPermissionsSA`

```
GET /security/service-accounts/permissions
```

Retrieve all workspace permissions for a service account according to search criteria

It retrieves all workspace permissions according to several criteria:

environment : One environment of the account
workspace : One workspace of one environment of the account
serviceAccount : One service account of the account

**Parameters**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `workspaceId` | query | `string` | no | The workspace id (Optional) Example Value: 6089228181ef4423736e47a9 |
| `environmentId` | query | `string` | no | The environment id (Optional) Example Value: 6089228181ef4423736e47a8 |
| `serviceAccountId` | query | `string` | no | The service account id (Optional) Example Value: b9e10a3f-9d68-44bb-862f-b2aa56dc7191 |


### `workspace_permissions__getWorkspacePermissionSA`

```
GET /security/workspaces/{workspaceId}/service-accounts/{serviceAccountId}/permissions
```

**Parameters**

| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |

Update sets of workspace permissions on the current system. Allows to upload list of workspace permissions to be updated.Update actions will be applied in the same order as defined in the list

**Request body** (`application/json`): `Permission[]`.

## workspaces :: permissions

### `workspace_permissions__createPermissions`

```
POST /security/permissions/batch
```

Create sets of workspace permissions

Create sets of workspace permissions on the current system. Allows to upload list of workspace permissions to be created.Creation actions will be applied in the same order as defined in the list

_No path/query/header parameters._

**Request body** (`application/json`): `Permission[]`.


### `workspace_permissions__createWorkspacePermissions`

```
POST /security/workspaces/{workspaceId}/users/{userId}/permissions
```

Create a workspace permission

Create a permission of a user on a workspace.

**Parameters**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `workspaceId` | path | `string` | yes | The workspace where rights will be applied. Example Value: 6089228181ef4423736e47a9 |
| `userId` | path | `string` | yes | The user for which rights will be applied. Example Value: b9e10a3f-9d68-44bb-862f-b2aa56dc7191 |

**Request body** (`application/json`): `"AUTHOR" | "EXECUTE" | "VIEW" | "MANAGE" | "PUBLISH"[]`.


### `workspace_permissions__deletePermissions`

```
DELETE /security/permissions/batch
```

Delete workspace permissions

Remove all permissions where user id is one from specified ones with request AND workspace is one from specified ones with request.
Special case: empty collection for users means that permissions for all users and specified workspaces will be deleted (and vise versa).

**Parameters**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `userIds` | query | `string[]` | no | User ids list used to compute permission intersections with specified workspaces. |
| `workspaceIds` | query | `string[]` | no | Workspace ids list used to compute permission intersections with specified users. |


### `workspace_permissions__deleteWorkspacePermissions`

```
DELETE /security/workspaces/{workspaceId}/users/{userId}/permissions
```

Delete a workspace permission

Delete a permission of a user on a workspace.

**Parameters**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `workspaceId` | path | `string` | yes | The workspace where rights will be applied. Example Value: 6089228181ef4423736e47a9 |
| `userId` | path | `string` | yes | The user for which rights will be applied. Example Value: b9e10a3f-9d68-44bb-862f-b2aa56dc7191 |


### `workspace_permissions__getPermissions`

```
GET /security/permissions
```

Retrieve all workspace permissions according to search criteria

It retrieves all workspace permissions according to several criteria:

* environment : One environment of the account
* workspace : One workspace of one environment of the account
* user : One user of the account

**Parameters**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `workspaceId` | query | `string` | no | The workspace id (Optional) Example Value: 6089228181ef4423736e47a9 |
| `environmentId` | query | `string` | no | The environment id (Optional) Example Value: 6089228181ef4423736e47a8 |
| `userId` | query | `string` | no | The user id (Optional) Example Value: b9e10a3f-9d68-44bb-862f-b2aa56dc7191 |


### `workspace_permissions__getWorkspacePermission`

```
GET /security/workspaces/{workspaceId}/users/{userId}/permissions
```

Read a workspace permission

Read a permission of a user on a workspace.

**Parameters**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `workspaceId` | path | `string` | yes | The workspace where rights will be applied. Example Value: 6089228181ef4423736e47a9 |
| `userId` | path | `string` | yes | The user for which rights will be applied. Example Value: b9e10a3f-9d68-44bb-862f-b2aa56dc7191 |
